# Templates — what to copy into a new demo project

This directory contains the **frozen pipeline scripts** plus **per-demo starter stubs**. The skill's `references/bootstrap.md` lists the exact copy commands; this file is a cheat-sheet for what each template is and whether you should edit it.

## Frozen (copy verbatim, do not edit)

These files encode the answers to design questions you don't want to re-litigate. Modifying them will silently break downstream stages.

| Path | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| `pnpm-workspace.yaml` | Workspace globs (`demos/*` + `demos/*/*`) |
| `.npmrc` | strict-peer-deps off, auto-install-peers on |
| `.gitignore` | Ignores generated assets + caches + .local |
| `tsconfig.base.json` | TS strict + ESNext, no emit |
| `analyzer/package.json`, `analyzer/tsconfig.json` | Analyzer pkg deps + ts config |
| `analyzer/python/ocr_keyframes.py` | Apple Vision OCR sidecar |
| `analyzer/scripts/bootstrap-python.ts` | Creates `.venv` with `ocrmac` |
| `analyzer/src/{ffmpeg,ocr,types}.ts` | ffprobe + keyframe extract + freezedetect + OCR spawn |
| `assets/package.json`, `assets/tsconfig.json` | Assets pkg deps + ts config |
| `video/package.json`, `video/tsconfig.json` | Video pkg deps + ts config |
| `video/remotion.config.ts` | h264, CRF 18, yuv420p, AAC 192k, concurrency |
| `video/scripts/warm-voice.ts` | TTS synthesis + timeline.json emission |
| `video/scripts/curate.ts` | OCR-driven clip window picker |
| `video/scripts/test-pronunciation.ts` | A/B test brand-name spellings for Kokoro |
| `video/src/index.ts`, `video/src/Root.tsx` | Remotion entrypoint + Composition (rename Composition id only) |
| `video/src/styles.css` | Global reset + `.shimmer-text` accent |
| `video/src/data/timeline.ts` | Type defs + import of timeline.json |
| `video/src/data/timeline.json` | Placeholder — regenerated by `warm-voice.ts` |
| `video/src/components/SceneShell.tsx` | Premium dark surface (aurora + grid + grain) |
| `video/src/components/Subtitle.tsx` | YouTube-CC style subtitle bar (disabled by default) |
| `video/src/scenes/VideoScene.tsx` | Multi-clip crossfade + playbackRate wrapper |

## Customise (rewrite for your demo)

These are starter scaffolds with placeholder content. Replace the placeholders with your product's brand + script + scenes.

| Path | What you change |
| --- | --- |
| `package.json` | Replace `DEMO_NAME` / `SCOPE` |
| `demo-package.json` | Replace `DEMO_NAME` / `SCOPE` |
| `assets/src/prepare.ts` | Source URLs, hero path, music sources |
| `analyzer/src/analyze.ts` | `SOURCES` array (source ids + paths + freeze thresholds) |
| `video/scripts/warm-voice.ts` | `SCENE_SOURCE` map + `sceneSpecs` ordering + `*_MIN_HOLD_MS` |
| `video/src/data/narration.ts` | All cues (`text` + `clipTags`) and `SceneId` union |
| `video/src/Root.tsx` | Rename `<Composition id="...">` to your product |
| `video/src/components/BrandMark.tsx` | Product wordmark |
| `video/src/scenes/HeroScene.tsx` | Eyebrow / headline / supporting / chips |
| `video/src/scenes/WhatIsScene.tsx` | Hero statement + 3 pillars |
| `video/src/scenes/SectionScene.tsx` | `PLATFORM_SECTION` content + extra sections |
| `video/src/scenes/OutroScene.tsx` | Wordmark + tagline + footer credits |
| `video/src/compositions/ProductDemo.tsx` | `renderScene()` switch (which scene → which component) |

## Placeholders to find-and-replace

After copying, do one pass through all files to replace:

| Find | Replace |
| --- | --- |
| `DEMO_NAME` | your demo name (e.g. `audit-demo`) |
| `SCOPE` | your npm scope (e.g. `@my-team`) or strip the scope entirely |
| `PRODUCT` (in narration, scenes, BrandMark) | your product's user-visible name |
| `PRODUCTDemo` (in Root.tsx + video/package.json render scripts) | `PascalCaseProductDemo` (e.g. `AuditDemo`) |
| `PRODUCTNAME` (in test-pronunciation.ts) | the brand name you're A/B testing pronunciation for |
| `product-hero.mp4`, `product-feature-1.mp4` | filenames you used in `prepare.ts` |

The skill's `bootstrap.md` reference walks through every step in detail. Read that before copying.

## Optional templates not bundled

The AIcG demo also had an `ArchScene` (animated 4-tier topology with connector pulses), a parent-brand logo component (`CosmosLogo`), and brand-asset SVGs. These are too product-specific to bundle — see `references/scenes.md` archetype 3 if you need to author a similar architecture scene.
